DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION_CATEGORY]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION_CATEGORY]
( 
	[DispositionCategoryID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[DispositionCategory] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_DispositionCategoryID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
